insights.title: Forecast → — App Total Revenue likely steady next period — App Total New Subs in line with upstream.
insights.body: App Total New Subs +0.7% moves with its upstream (App Total New User -9.1%, App Total Install -6.5%); no outsized App Total Revenue swing expected from the trial cohort next period.

insights.title: Lead–lag check — App Total Revenue's -0.3% isn't from acquisition — check churn / pricing / refunds.
insights.body: App Total Revenue 07-11 vs 07-04 = -0.3% runs counter to its 7-day driver App Total New Subs 07-04 vs 06-27 = +3.2% — App Total Revenue's move isn't explained by the prior subs cohort; look at churn, refunds, or pricing rather than acquisition.

insights.title: Funnel conversion — Conversion to New Subs splits by app — YMK surging (+16.7% vs upstream -5.1%).
insights.body: Upstream→New Subs conversion splits by app: YMK +16.7% vs upstream -5.1% (conversion surging); All App +0.7% vs upstream -7.8% (conversion surging). (Revenue is downstream and lags ~7d — see the lead–lag check.)

insights.title: App split — App Total New User -9.1% concentrated in YCP — not platform-wide.
insights.body: App Total New User -9.1% is uneven by app (All App -9.1%, YMK -6.6%, YCP -12.7%) — driven mainly by YCP, not a platform-wide shift.

insights.title: Forecast → — App Total Revenue likely steady next period — App Total New Subs in line with upstream.
insights.body: App Total New Subs -4.4% moves with its upstream (App Total New User -2.5%, App Total Install +1.9%); no outsized App Total Revenue swing expected from the trial cohort next period.

insights.title: Lead–lag check — App Total Revenue is tracking its subs signal as expected.
insights.body: App Total Revenue this wk vs prior wk = -6.1% tracks its 7-day driver App Total New Subs prior wk vs the week before = -4.3% — revenue is following the subs signal as expected.

insights.title: Funnel conversion — Conversion to New Subs splits by app — YCP softening (-10.9% vs upstream -0.0%).
insights.body: Upstream→New Subs conversion splits by app: YCP -10.9% vs upstream -0.0% (conversion softening). (Revenue is downstream and lags ~7d — see the lead–lag check.)

insights.title: Broad-based — App Total Revenue down across every app — broad-based, look for a platform-wide cause.
insights.body: App Total Revenue is down across every app (All App -6.1%, YMK -6.8%, YCP -6.3%) — a broad move, so look for a platform-wide cause, not an app-specific one.
